items.title: Observations about Chinese AI work culture: 1.
items.title_zh: 对中国人工智能工作文化的观察：1.
items.description: Observations about Chinese AI work culture: 1. Many arrive at work late (11 am) and work until late at night (11 pm). 2. Due to the schedule above, many employees are young. Hard for parents to sustain the same schedule. 3. Everyone at the…
items.description_zh: 对中国人工智能工作文化的观察： 1. 许多人上班很晚（上午 11 点），工作到深夜（晚上 11 点）。 2. 由于上述日程安排，员工年轻化较多。父母很难维持同样的时间表。 3. 每个人都在……

items.title: New in Claude Code: /ultraplan Claude builds an implementation plan for you on the web.
items.title_zh: Claude 代码中的新增功能：/ultraplan Claude 在网络上为您构建实施计划。
items.description: New in Claude Code: /ultraplan Claude builds an implementation plan for you on the web. You can read it and edit it, then run the plan on the web or back in your terminal. Available now in preview for all users with CC on the web enabled.
items.description_zh: Claude 代码中的新增功能：/ultraplan Claude 在网络上为您构建实施计划。您可以阅读并编辑它，然后在网络上或在终端中运行该计划。现已为所有启用了网络 CC 的用户提供预览版。

meta.bio: Claude Code @anthropicai. prev YC W20, mit media lab. towards machines of loving grace

items.title: Two years ago on Tucker’s show I talked about how the AI doomers “rationalist” ideology w…
items.title_zh: 两年前，在塔克的节目中，我谈到了人工智能末日“理性主义”意识形态如何......
items.description: Two years ago on Tucker’s show I talked about how the AI doomers “rationalist” ideology will eventually lead to violence. And sure enough the alleged Sam Altman Molotov attacker appears to be a believer and maybe even an active participant…
